UserIntegrationFields.Name: Speaker ID
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Enter the Azure Voice name (e.g. en-US-AvaMultilingualNeural).

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Speaker Language Code
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Enter the BCP-47 language code (e.g. en-US).

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Model ID
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Select the ElevenLabs Model.

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Voice ID
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Enter the ElevenLabs Voice ID.

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Language Code
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: ISO 639-1 language code (e.g. 'en', 'es'). Optional.

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Stability
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Stability of the voice (0.0 to 1.0).

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Similarity Boost
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Clarity + Similarity enhancement (0.0 to 1.0).

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Style Exaggeration
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Style exaggeration (0.0 to 1.0).

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Use Speaker Boost
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Boosts the similarity to the original speaker.

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Speed
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Voice speed multiplier (0.7 to 1.2 is safe range).

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Pronunciation Dictionaries
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: List of Pronunciation Dictionary IDs.

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Apply Text Normalization
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Controls automatic text normalization.

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Use Context History
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Uses previous generation IDs for continuity (experimental).

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Model
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Select the Cartesia TTS model.

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Voice ID
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: The UUID of the voice you want to use.

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Language Code
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Language code (e.g. 'en', 'ar').

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Volume
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Adjust volume (0.5x to 2.0x). (Sonic 3 only)

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Speed
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Adjust speed (0.6x to 1.5x). (Sonic 3 only)

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Emotion
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Guide the emotion of the generated speech. (Sonic 3 only)

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Pronunciation Dictionary ID
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: UUID of the pronunciation dictionary. (Sonic 3 only)

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Model
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Select the Fish Audio model.

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Reference Voice ID
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Voice model ID from the Fish Audio library or your custom models.

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Temperature
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Controls expressiveness (0.0 to 1.0). Higher is more varied, lower is more consistent.

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Top P
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Controls diversity via nucleus sampling (0.0 to 1.0).

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Speaking Speed
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Speaking rate multiplier (0.5 to 2.0). 1.0 = normal.

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Volume (dB)
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Volume adjustment in decibels. 0 = no change, positive = louder, negative = quieter.

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Latency Mode
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Latency-quality trade-off.

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Normalize Text
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Normalizes text for English and Chinese, improving stability for numbers.

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Repetition Penalty
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Penalty for repeating audio patterns. Values above 1.0 reduce repetition.

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Chunk Length
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Text segment size for processing (100 to 300).

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Max New Tokens
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Maximum audio tokens to generate per text chunk.

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Model
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Select the MiniMax TTS model.

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Voice ID
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: The ID of the target voice (e.g. 'English_Graceful_Lady').

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Language Boost
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Language hint for the model. Use 'auto' or a specific language like 'English' or 'Arabic'.

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Voice Speed
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Speech speed. Range: [0.5, 2.0].

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Voice Volume
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Speech volume. Range: (0, 10].

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Voice Pitch
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Speech pitch adjustment. Range: [-12, 12].

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Emotion
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Emotion control (e.g. 'happy', 'sad', 'fluent', 'whisper'). Leave empty for auto.

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Text Normalization
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Enable text normalization for better digit-reading.

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Pronunciation Dictionary (Tones)
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Defines pronunciation rules. e.g. 'omg/oh my god'.
UserIntegrationFields.Placeholder: Type and press enter to add

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Modify: Pitch (Deepen/Brighten)
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Deepen (-100) to Brighten (100).

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Modify: Intensity (Strong/Soft)
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Strong (-100) to Soft (100).

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Modify: Timbre (Full/Crisp)
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Full (-100) to Crisp (100).

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Modify: Sound Effect
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Apply a sound effect.

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Model Version
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Select the Octave model version.

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Voice ID / Name
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: The ID or Name of the voice. Required for Octave 2.

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Voice Provider
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Source of the voice. 'Hume AI' for Voice Library presets, 'Custom' for cloned voices.

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Voice Description (Prompt)
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: If voice is provided, acts as acting directions. If no voice is provided (Octave 1 only), generates a new voice based on prompt.
UserIntegrationFields.Placeholder: e.g. A calm, empathetic female voice.

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Voice Speed
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Speed multiplier. Range [0.75, 1.5].

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Instant Mode
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: When enabled, streams audio as quickly as possible. Disable if generating multiple candidates.

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Model
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Select the Inworld TTS model.

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Voice ID
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: The ID of the voice to use for synthesizing speech (e.g. 'Dennis').

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Speaking Rate
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Speaking rate/speed, in the range [0.5, 1.5]. Default is 1.0.

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Temperature
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Determines randomness (0.0 to 2.0). Default is 1.1.

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Apply Text Normalization
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Automatically expands and standardizes numbers, dates, times, and abbreviations.

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Model
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Select the Murf AI TTS model.

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Region (Data Residency)
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Select the region to route the request to. Use Global for best-effort low latency, or specific regions for data residency.

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Voice ID
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: The ID or name of the voice actor (e.g., 'en-US-natalie' or 'natalie').

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Multi-Native Locale
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Enable a voice to speak in multiple languages natively (e.g. 'en-US', 'fr-FR').

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Style
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: The voice style (e.g. 'Angry', 'Sad'). Varies per voice.

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Speaking Rate
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Speed of the voiceover. Range: -50 to 50.

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Pitch
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Pitch of the voiceover. Range: -50 to 50.

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Variation
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Adds dynamic changes in pause, pitch, and speed. Range: 0 to 5.

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Pronunciation Dictionary (JSON)
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Define custom pronunciations in JSON format. E.g. {"live":{"type":"IPA","pronunciation":"laɪv"}}

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Speaker Name
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: e.g., Khadija, Amjad, Salma, or a Cloned Voice ID.

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Dialect
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: The Arabic dialect associated with the speaker.

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Voice UUID
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: The UUID of the voice to use for synthesis.

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Model
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Select the Resemble AI synthesis model.

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Use HD
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Enables higher-definition synthesis with a small latency trade-off.

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Engine Type
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Select between Standard/Chirp voices or the new Gemini TTS models.

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Gemini Model
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Select the specific Gemini TTS model.

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Use Custom Voice Clone?
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Select 'Yes' if you want to use a generated Voice Cloning Key instead of a standard voice name.

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Voice Cloning Key
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Enter the custom voice cloning key.

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Voice Name
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Standard voice name (e.g., 'en-US-Journey-F').

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Language Code
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: BCP-47 language tag (e.g. 'en-US').

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Style Instructions (Prompt)
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: System instruction to guide the tone/style (only for Gemini TTS).

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Speaking Rate
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Speaking speed [0.25, 2.0]. Default is 1.0.

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Pitch
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Speaking pitch [-20.0, 20.0]. Default is 0.0.

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Custom Pronunciations (JSON Array)
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Provide a JSON array of objects: [{

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Model Family
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Select the Deepgram TTS model generation.

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Voice Name
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: The name of the voice (e.g., 'asteria', 'luna', 'nestor').

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Language Code
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: The 2-letter language code (e.g., 'en', 'es'). Must match supported languages for the voice.

UserIntegrationFields.Name: MIP Opt-Out
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Opt out of the Deepgram Model Improvement Program.

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Model
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Select the Speechify synthesis model.

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Voice ID
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: The ID of the voice to be used for synthesizing speech.

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Language Locale
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: ISO 639-1 language and ISO 3166-1 region code (e.g. 'en-US'). Leave empty for auto-detection in mixed texts.

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Loudness Normalization
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Normalizes audio loudness to standard level (-14 LUFS). May increase latency.

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Text Normalization
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Transforms numbers, dates, etc. into words (e.g. '55' -> 'fifty five').

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Model
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Select the Zyphra TTS model.

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Language Code
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Language code (e.g., 'en-us', 'fr-fr', 'de', 'ja', 'ko', 'cmn').

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Default Voice Name
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Select a pre-defined standard voice.

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Speaking Rate
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Speed of speech (5 to 35). Default: 15. Note: +3 applied automatically for Japanese.

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Quality Score (vqscore)
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Controls voice quality vs. speaker similarity (0.6 to 0.8). Default: 0.78.

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Max Frequency (fmax)
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Maximum frequency for audio generation. Default: 22050.

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Emotions (JSON)
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: JSON object defining emotional weights (0.0 to 1.0). e.g., {"happiness": 0.8, "sadness": 0.05}. Transformer model only.

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Pitch Std Deviation
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Pitch standard deviation (0 to 100). Default: 45.0. Transformer model only.

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Speaker Noised
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Denoises reference audio to improve voice stability. Hybrid model only.

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Language Code
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Language code (e.g., 'en', 'es', 'de', 'nl', 'hi').

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Voice ID
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: The UUID of the desired voice. This implicitly selects the underlying model.

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Voice Speed
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Playback speed. Snaps to 0.7 (slow), 1.0 (normal), or 1.5 (fast).

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Temperature
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Randomness introduced into the model (0.0 to 1.0).

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Voice Profile
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Select the Pakistani voice profile.

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Phrase Replacement Config ID
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Optional ID of a phrase replacement configuration to apply (for custom pronunciations).

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Model
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Select the Sarvam TTS model.

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Target Language Code
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: The language of the text in BCP-47 format.

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Speaker Name
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: The speaker voice to be used. (Ensure compatibility with model version).

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Pitch
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Controls the pitch (-0.75 to 0.75). (v2 only)

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Loudness
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Controls the loudness (0.3 to 3.0). (v2 only)

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Enable Preprocessing
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Normalization of English words and numeric entities. (v2 only - v3 is always true)

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Pace
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Controls the speed (0.3 to 3.0).

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Pace
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Controls the speed (0.5 to 2.0).

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Temperature
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Controls randomness (0.01 to 1.0). (v3-beta only)

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Model
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Select the Rime AI TTS model.

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Speaker Name
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: The name of the voice (e.g. 'astra'). Must match model support.

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Language
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Language code. Must match the language spoken by the provided speaker.

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Speed Alpha
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Adjusts the speed of speech. Lower than 1.0 is faster. Higher than 1.0 is slower.

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Max Tokens
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: The max tokens. Range is 200 to 5000.

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Repetition Penalty
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Penalizes new tokens based on prior text. Typical range 1 to 2.

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Temperature
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Controls randomness. Range 0 to 1.

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Top P
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Controls cumulative probability. Range 0 to 1.

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Pause Between Brackets
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Adds pauses between words enclosed in angle brackets. e.g. <200>

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Phonemize Between Brackets
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Specify phonemes for a word enclosed in curly brackets.

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Inline Speed Alpha
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Comma-separated list of speed values applied to words in square brackets.

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Skip Text Normalization
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Skips text normalization to reduce latency (may cause mispronunciation of digits).

UserIntegrationFields.Name: Save OOVs
UserIntegrationFields.Tooltip: Save out-of-vocabulary words to dashboard.
